---
name: New skill proposal
about: Propose a new skill for an existing or new plugin
labels: enhancement, new-skill
---

**Proposed plugin / skill name:**

<!-- e.g. `infra-toolkit/cloudflare-r2-cors` (kebab-case). If proposing a new plugin, say so. -->

**What workflow does this capture?**

<!-- One paragraph. The skill should encode judgment, not a one-line shell command. -->

**Trigger phrases:**

<!-- 3+ phrases or contexts that should activate the skill. -->

**Why is this not already a skill?**

<!-- Is this currently in CLAUDE.md? Pasted into chat repeatedly? Tribal knowledge? -->

**Proposed description (frontmatter):**

```yaml
description: ...
when_to_use: ...
```

**Are you willing to author the SKILL.md?**

- [ ] Yes
- [ ] No, I'm proposing it for someone else to write
